title: amarenus campestris
intro: Amarenus campestris, also known as the field marigold or pot marigold, is a plant species that belongs to the Calendula genus. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amarenus campestris include wound healing, skin protection, and the alleviation of symptoms associated with digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, salves, and creams, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
